mapper.select: select id, resources_id, renewal_switch, user_id, renewal_period, renewal_time, renewal_promo, is_agree_original_price, acceptable_price_increase_pct, current_price_snapshot, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status from server_resources_renewal where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

select id, resources_id, renewal_switch, user_id, renewal_period, renewal_time, renewal_promo, is_agree_original_price, acceptable_price_increase_pct, current_price_snapshot, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status from server_resources_renewal where is_deleted = 0 and user_id = #{userId} and resources_id = #{resourcesId}
mapper.insert: insert into server_resources_renewal(id, resources_id, renewal_switch, user_id, renewal_period, renewal_time, renewal_promo, is_agree_original_price, acceptable_price_increase_pct, current_price_snapshot, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status) values (#{id}, #{resourcesId}, #{renewalSwitch}, #{userId}, #{renewalPeriod}, #{renewalTime}, #{renewalPromo}, #{isAgreeOriginalPrice}, #{acceptablePriceIncreasePct}, #{currentPriceSnapshot}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{status})

insert into server_resources_renewal(id,resources_id, renewal_switch, user_id, renewal_period, renewal_time, renewal_promo, is_agree_original_price, acceptable_price_increase_pct, current_price_snapshot, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.resourcesId}, #{entity.renewalSwitch}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.renewalPeriod}, #{entity.renewalTime}, #{entity.renewalPromo}, #{entity.isAgreeOriginalPrice}, #{entity.acceptablePriceIncreasePct}, #{entity.currentPriceSnapshot}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status})

insert into server_resources_renewal(id,resources_id, renewal_switch, user_id, renewal_period, renewal_time, renewal_promo, is_agree_original_price, acceptable_price_increase_pct, current_price_snapshot, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.resourcesId}, #{entity.renewalSwitch}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.renewalPeriod}, #{entity.renewalTime}, #{entity.renewalPromo}, #{entity.isAgreeOriginalPrice}, #{entity.acceptablePriceIncreasePct}, #{entity.currentPriceSnapshot}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status})
on duplicate key update resources_id = values(resources_id), renewal_switch = values(renewal_switch), user_id = values(user_id), renewal_period = values(renewal_period), renewal_time = values(renewal_time), renewal_promo = values(renewal_promo), is_agree_original_price = values(is_agree_original_price), acceptable_price_increase_pct = values(acceptable_price_increase_pct), current_price_snapshot = values(current_price_snapshot), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time), status = values(status)
